Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Correlation of information from our different sensors is not necessarily the only way to identify radar echoes. As the player, we can make educated guesses on what certain radar echoes may actually be without having another sensor reporting on that contact too.

For example, the majority of the radar echoes appearing on the Tactical Display are spaced out far away from each other (more than 50 nautical miles), and most are traveling in roughly the same direction either east or west. These contacts can likely be classified as neutral merchant ships transiting known sea lane corridors.
